_meta.description: Machine-readable summary of audit assurance layers

ct_evidence_layers.name: Statistical timing leakage testing
ct_evidence_layers.notes: Advisory -- timing noise on shared CI runners may mask subtle leaks. |t| > 4.5 = timing leak.

ct_evidence_layers.name: Deterministic CT verification
ct_evidence_layers.notes: LLVM-pass analysis: marks secret inputs as tainted, verifies no tainted value reaches a branch or memory index.

ct_evidence_layers.name: Deterministic CT verification
ct_evidence_layers.notes: Uses VALGRIND_MAKE_MEM_UNDEFINED on secret inputs, checks for conditional jumps on undefined data.

ct_evidence_layers.name: Disassembly branch scan
ct_evidence_layers.notes: Checks compiled CT functions for conditional branches on secret-dependent values.

ct_evidence_layers.name: Machine-checked proof frameworks
ct_evidence_layers.notes: Vale/Jasmin/Coq/Fiat-Crypto generated proofs not currently applied.

blocking_workflows.name: CI (build + test)
blocking_workflows.description: Linux gcc/clang Release+Debug, macOS, Windows, ARM64, WASM, RISC-V

blocking_workflows.name: ct-verif + valgrind-ct
blocking_workflows.description: Deterministic CT verification, blocks merge on failure

blocking_workflows.name: CodeQL
blocking_workflows.description: GitHub code scanning for C++ vulnerabilities

blocking_workflows.name: Cppcheck
blocking_workflows.description: Static analysis, uploaded to code scanning

advisory_workflows.name: GPU Self-Hosted
advisory_workflows.description: Real GPU hardware tests (CUDA RTX 5060 Ti)
